creator: lysfjord.daniel@smokepit.net
text: After todays update of textproc/rubygem-elasticsearch6 the dependency of rubygem-elasticsearch-transport6=${PORTVERSION} does not match the available version of rubygem-elasticsearch-transport6 (6.8.1_1), changing the dependency to rubygem-elasticsearch-transport6=${PORTVERSION}_${PORTREVISION} solves the issue.
